name_cn:
Top-tier replica, size-changing chip
 M12192 Top-tier replica dynamic size-changing. Louis Vuitton presents the Sunset Vibe handbag in a new series to showcase the brand's elegance. The handbag features patent lambskin, Monogram canvas elements, and LV turn-lock, all highlighting a retro style. The pocket design is convenient for storing daily essentials, and the detachable shoulder strap allows for multiple carrying ways. 27.0 x 18.0 x 3.0 cm (L x H x W)
	•	lambskin
	•	calfskin trim
	•	fabric lining
	•	metal hardware
	•	turn-lock
	•	internal patch pocket
	•	front patch pocket
	•	shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable
	•	strap half-length: 23.0 cm
	•	strap half-length adjustable to: 48.5 cm
